!== RecurDyn V9R5 x64 (9.5.36410.0.9509) ==
!
!
!=================== MODEL DATA FILE GENERATED BY RECURDYN MODELER ====================
!
!====================================== Ground ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='Ground'
PART / 1 , GROUND
, NAME = 'Ground'
, TYPEENTITY = GENERAL
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='InertiaMarker'
MARKER / 1
, NAME = 'Ground.InertiaMarker'
, PART = 1
, QP = 0 , 0 , 0
, REULER = 0D , 0D , 0D
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='Marker1'
MARKER / 2
, NAME = 'Ground.Marker1'
, PART = 1
, QP = 0.000755125383641255 , -0.0275851020684613 , 0.0825102884477394
, REULER = 0 , 0 , 0
 
 
!====================================== DummyBody@WOR========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='MotherBody'


!======================================== Body ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='q1_motor'
PART / 3
, NAME = 'q1_motor'
, TYPEENTITY = GENERAL
, MASS = 0.310920544425175
, CM = 4
, IP = 7.1794369594646e-05 , 7.0766413861297e-05 , 7.19031471880574e-05
, 1.33059061364678e-09 , -4.79515307703144e-09 , -3.0268794320383e-08
, QG = 0 , 0 , 0
, REULER = 0 , 0 , 0
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='CM'
MARKER / 4
, NAME = 'q1_motor.CM'
, PART = 3
, QP = 1.30706577694355e-06 , -0.0159771065881619 , 0.139970266357842
, REULER = 0 , 0 , 0
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='q1_act'
MARKER / 5
, NAME = 'q1_motor.q1_act'
, PART = 3
, QP = 0 , -0.02 , 0.14
, REULER = 0 , 1.5707963267949 , 0
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='Marker1'
MARKER / 6
, NAME = 'q1_motor.Marker1'
, PART = 3
, QP = 0 , -0.02 , 0.14
, REULER = 0 , 1.5707963267949 , 1.5707963267949
 
 
!======================================== Body ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='body1'
PART / 4
, NAME = 'body1'
, TYPEENTITY = GENERAL
, MASS = 10.0123496865811
, CM = 7
, IP = 0.0829601614566715 , 0.0391199810914461 , 0.0649458588226152
, -0.000328089653994623 , -0.000119428008908532 , 2.09012210735718e-06
, QG = 0 , 0 , 0
, REULER = 0 , 0 , 0
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='CM'
MARKER / 7
, NAME = 'body1.CM'
, PART = 4
, QP = -0.00263359756766053 , 0.0911172596849167 , 1.68446101733395e-05
, REULER = 0 , 0 , 0
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='Ai'
MARKER / 8
, NAME = 'body1.Ai'
, PART = 4
, QP = 0 , -0.02 , 0
, REULER = 0 , 1.5707963267949 , 3.14159265358979
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='Cij'
MARKER / 9
, NAME = 'body1.Cij'
, PART = 4
, QP = 0 , 0.2 , 0
, REULER = 3.14159265358979 , 0 , 0
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='Marker1'
MARKER / 10
, NAME = 'body1.Marker1'
, PART = 4
, QP = 0 , -0.02 , 0
, REULER = 3.14159265358979 , 1.5707963267949 , 1.5707963267949
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='Marker2'
MARKER / 11
, NAME = 'body1.Marker2'
, PART = 4
, QP = 0 , 0.2 , 0
, REULER = 1.5707963267949 , 0 , 0
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='Marker3'
MARKER / 12
, NAME = 'body1.Marker3'
, PART = 4
, QP = 0 , -0.02 , 0
, REULER = 0 , 1.5707963267949 , 1.5707963267949
 
 
!======================================== Body ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='base'
PART / 5
, NAME = 'base'
, TYPEENTITY = GENERAL
, MASS = 21.3112081746921
, CM = 13
, IP = 0.366189232131684 , 0.47648377471474 , 0.199885735500912
, -0.000976077048043456 , -0.000992843194472926 , -0.0524376459974293
, QG = 0 , 0 , 0
, REULER = 0 , 0 , 0
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='CM'
MARKER / 13
, NAME = 'base.CM'
, PART = 5
, QP = 0.000755125383641255 , -0.0275851020684613 , 0.0825102884477394
, REULER = 0 , 0 , 0
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='Marker1'
MARKER / 14
, NAME = 'base.Marker1'
, PART = 5
, QP = 0.000755125383641255 , -0.0275851020684613 , 0.0825102884477394
, REULER = 0 , 0 , 0
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='origin'
MARKER / 15
, NAME = 'base.origin'
, PART = 5
, QP = 0 , -0.02 , 0
, REULER = 0 , 0 , 0
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='Cij'
MARKER / 16
, NAME = 'base.Cij'
, PART = 5
, QP = 0 , -0.02 , 0
, REULER = 0 , 1.5707963267949 , 3.14159265358979
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='Marker2'
MARKER / 17
, NAME = 'base.Marker2'
, PART = 5
, QP = 0 , -0.02 , 0
, REULER = 3.14159265358979 , 1.5707963267949 , 1.5707963267949
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='Marker3'
MARKER / 18
, NAME = 'base.Marker3'
, PART = 5
, QP = 0 , -0.02 , 0
, REULER = 0 , 1.5707963267949 , 1.5707963267949
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='Marker4'
MARKER / 19
, NAME = 'base.Marker4'
, PART = 5
, QP = 0 , -0.02 , 0.14
, REULER = 0 , 1.5707963267949 , 1.5707963267949
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='Marker5'
MARKER / 20
, NAME = 'base.Marker5'
, PART = 5
, QP = 0 , -0.02 , 0.25
, REULER = 0 , 1.5707963267949 , 1.5707963267949
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='Marker6'
MARKER / 21
, NAME = 'base.Marker6'
, PART = 5
, QP = 0.075 , -0.02 , 0.25
, REULER = 0 , 1.5707963267949 , 1.5707963267949
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='Marker7'
MARKER / 22
, NAME = 'base.Marker7'
, PART = 5
, QP = -0.075 , -0.02 , 0.25
, REULER = 0 , 1.5707963267949 , 1.5707963267949
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='q1_act'
MARKER / 23
, NAME = 'base.q1_act'
, PART = 5
, QP = 0 , -0.02 , 0.14
, REULER = 0 , 1.5707963267949 , 0
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='q2_act'
MARKER / 24
, NAME = 'base.q2_act'
, PART = 5
, QP = 0 , -0.02 , 0.25
, REULER = 0 , 1.5707963267949 , 0
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='q3_act'
MARKER / 25
, NAME = 'base.q3_act'
, PART = 5
, QP = 0.075 , -0.02 , 0.25
, REULER = 0 , 1.5707963267949 , 0
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='q4_act'
MARKER / 26
, NAME = 'base.q4_act'
, PART = 5
, QP = -0.075 , -0.02 , 0.25
, REULER = 0 , 1.5707963267949 , 0
 
 
!======================================== Body ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='q4_motor'
PART / 6
, NAME = 'q4_motor'
, TYPEENTITY = GENERAL
, MASS = 0.884391525024331
, CM = 27
, IP = 0.000626904101201552 , 0.000369503570594572 , 0.000626761409100112
, -2.68730458352427e-07 , 1.50873278614851e-07 , 2.46466352778066e-08
, QG = 0 , 0 , 0
, REULER = 0 , 0 , 0
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='CM'
MARKER / 27
, NAME = 'q4_motor.CM'
, PART = 6
, QP = -0.0750012803930522 , -0.040213876633073 , 0.249999840922683
, REULER = 0 , 0 , 0
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='q4_act'
MARKER / 28
, NAME = 'q4_motor.q4_act'
, PART = 6
, QP = -0.075 , -0.02 , 0.25
, REULER = 0 , 1.5707963267949 , 0
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='Marker1'
MARKER / 29
, NAME = 'q4_motor.Marker1'
, PART = 6
, QP = -0.075 , -0.02 , 0.25
, REULER = 0 , 1.5707963267949 , 1.5707963267949
 
 
!======================================== Body ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='q3_motor'
PART / 7
, NAME = 'q3_motor'
, TYPEENTITY = GENERAL
, MASS = 0.884391560415185
, CM = 30
, IP = 0.000626904669398412 , 0.000369503589366627 , 0.000626760901801409
, -2.68850693452433e-07 , 1.50735976598285e-07 , 2.45666335727317e-08
, QG = 0 , 0 , 0
, REULER = 0 , 0 , 0
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='CM'
MARKER / 30
, NAME = 'q3_motor.CM'
, PART = 7
, QP = 0.0749987145554728 , -0.0402138776139038 , 0.249999837368259
, REULER = 0 , 0 , 0
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='q3_act'
MARKER / 31
, NAME = 'q3_motor.q3_act'
, PART = 7
, QP = 0.075 , -0.02 , 0.25
, REULER = 0 , 1.5707963267949 , 0
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='Marker1'
MARKER / 32
, NAME = 'q3_motor.Marker1'
, PART = 7
, QP = 0.075 , -0.02 , 0.25
, REULER = 0 , 1.5707963267949 , 1.5707963267949
 
 
!======================================== Body ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='q2_motor'
PART / 8
, NAME = 'q2_motor'
, TYPEENTITY = GENERAL
, MASS = 0.884391667056809
, CM = 33
, IP = 0.000627164195872035 , 0.000369503675690764 , 0.000626501484694499
, -1.69589104496958e-07 , -1.84627469749079e-07 , 7.65046555909882e-08
, QG = 0 , 0 , 0
, REULER = 0 , 0 , 0
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='CM'
MARKER / 33
, NAME = 'q2_motor.CM'
, PART = 8
, QP = -1.8884963639523e-07 , -0.0402138792565474 , 0.250001252493125
, REULER = 0 , 0 , 0
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='q2_act'
MARKER / 34
, NAME = 'q2_motor.q2_act'
, PART = 8
, QP = 0 , -0.02 , 0.25
, REULER = 0 , 1.5707963267949 , 0
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='Marker1'
MARKER / 35
, NAME = 'q2_motor.Marker1'
, PART = 8
, QP = 0 , -0.02 , 0.25
, REULER = 0 , 1.5707963267949 , 1.5707963267949
 
 
!======================================== Body ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='body2'
PART / 9
, NAME = 'body2'
, TYPEENTITY = GENERAL
, MASS = 10.4391437674567
, CM = 36
, IP = 0.0780970193464117 , 0.0255871855807303 , 0.0745746466344453
, 3.53131298101708e-05 , -8.81620777833472e-06 , 0.00547282289489732
, QG = 0 , 0 , 0
, REULER = 0 , 0 , 0
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='CM'
MARKER / 36
, NAME = 'body2.CM'
, PART = 9
, QP = -6.9055875137089e-05 , 0.285154800614441 , -0.00686210917143882
, REULER = 0 , 0 , 0
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='Ai'
MARKER / 37
, NAME = 'body2.Ai'
, PART = 9
, QP = 0 , 0.2 , 0
, REULER = 3.14159265358979 , 0 , 0
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='Cij'
MARKER / 38
, NAME = 'body2.Cij'
, PART = 9
, QP = 0 , 0.43 , 0
, REULER = 1.5707963267949 , 0 , 0
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='Marker1'
MARKER / 39
, NAME = 'body2.Marker1'
, PART = 9
, QP = 0 , 0.2 , 0
, REULER = 1.5707963267949 , 0 , 0
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='Marker2'
MARKER / 40
, NAME = 'body2.Marker2'
, PART = 9
, QP = 0 , 0.43 , 0
, REULER = 1.5707963267949 , 0 , 0
 
 
!======================================== Body ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='body3'
PART / 10
, NAME = 'body3'
, TYPEENTITY = GENERAL
, MASS = 10.3406497234359
, CM = 41
, IP = 0.0792872354716476 , 0.0227404242493157 , 0.0781409250910383
, 8.26042768438978e-06 , 5.43833216931251e-06 , 0.00431986606376804
, QG = 0 , 0 , 0
, REULER = 0 , 0 , 0
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='CM'
MARKER / 41
, NAME = 'body3.CM'
, PART = 10
, QP = 3.20036133789324e-05 , 0.526906923463317 , -0.00548573987108039
, REULER = 0 , 0 , 0
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='Ai'
MARKER / 42
, NAME = 'body3.Ai'
, PART = 10
, QP = 0 , 0.43 , 0
, REULER = 1.5707963267949 , 0 , 0
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='Cij'
MARKER / 43
, NAME = 'body3.Cij'
, PART = 10
, QP = 0 , 0.66 , 0
, REULER = 1.5707963267949 , 3.14159265358979 , 0
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='Marker1'
MARKER / 44
, NAME = 'body3.Marker1'
, PART = 10
, QP = 0 , 0.43 , 0
, REULER = 1.5707963267949 , 0 , 0
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='Marker2'
MARKER / 45
, NAME = 'body3.Marker2'
, PART = 10
, QP = 0 , 0.66 , 0
, REULER = 1.5707963267949 , 0 , 0
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='Marker3'
MARKER / 46
, NAME = 'body3.Marker3'
, PART = 10
, QP = 0 , 0.66 , 0
, REULER = -1.5707963267949 , 3.14159265358979 , 0
 
 
!======================================== Body ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='body4'
PART / 11
, NAME = 'body4'
, TYPEENTITY = GENERAL
, MASS = 7.01416597186014
, CM = 47
, IP = 0.0393493190184971 , 0.0111764686166838 , 0.0410218257620852
, -0.000926169916890393 , -8.43406506016272e-06 , 0.000204330936352529
, QG = 0 , 0 , 0
, REULER = 0 , 0 , 0
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='CM'
MARKER / 47
, NAME = 'body4.CM'
, PART = 11
, QP = 0.00443191774292435 , 0.727588384009872 , -0.000679201979870376
, REULER = 0 , 0 , 0
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='Ai'
MARKER / 48
, NAME = 'body4.Ai'
, PART = 11
, QP = 0 , 0.66 , 0
, REULER = 1.5707963267949 , 3.14159265358979 , 0
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='Cij'
MARKER / 49
, NAME = 'body4.Cij'
, PART = 11
, QP = 0 , 0.84 , 0
, REULER = 3.14159265358979 , 3.14159265358979 , 0
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='Marker1'
MARKER / 50
, NAME = 'body4.Marker1'
, PART = 11
, QP = 0 , 0.66 , 0
, REULER = 1.5707963267949 , 0 , 0
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='Marker2'
MARKER / 51
, NAME = 'body4.Marker2'
, PART = 11
, QP = 0 , 0.66 , 0
, REULER = -1.5707963267949 , 3.14159265358979 , 0
 
 
!======================================== Joint ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='Fixed1'
JOINT / 1
, NAME = 'Fixed1'
, I = 14
, J = 2
, Fixed
, EXCLUDE_VBODY = FALSE
 
 
!======================================== Joint ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='Rev2'
JOINT / 2
, NAME = 'Rev2'
, I = 39
, J = 11
, Revolute
 
 
!======================================== Joint ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='Rev3'
JOINT / 3
, NAME = 'Rev3'
, I = 44
, J = 40
, Revolute
 
 
!======================================== Joint ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='Rev1'
JOINT / 4
, NAME = 'Rev1'
, I = 12
, J = 18
, Revolute
 
 
!======================================== Joint ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='Rev4'
JOINT / 5
, NAME = 'Rev4'
, I = 51
, J = 46
, Revolute
 
 
!======================================== Joint ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='Act1'
JOINT / 6
, NAME = 'Act1'
, I = 6
, J = 19
, Revolute
 
 
!======================================== Motion ========================================
!
MOTION / 11
, NAME = 'Act1.RMotion'
, JOINT = 6
, ROTATION 
, DISPLACEMENT 
, FUNCTION = sin(PI*time*2)*3\
 
 
!======================================== Joint ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='Act2'
JOINT / 7
, NAME = 'Act2'
, I = 35
, J = 20
, Revolute
 
 
!======================================== Motion ========================================
!
MOTION / 13
, NAME = 'Act2.RMotion'
, JOINT = 7
, ROTATION 
, DISPLACEMENT 
, FUNCTION = sin(PI*time*2)*0.2\
 
 
!======================================== Joint ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='Act3'
JOINT / 8
, NAME = 'Act3'
, I = 32
, J = 21
, Revolute
 
 
!======================================== Motion ========================================
!
MOTION / 15
, NAME = 'Act3.RMotion'
, JOINT = 8
, ROTATION 
, DISPLACEMENT 
, FUNCTION = sin(PI*time*2)*0.2\
 
 
!======================================== Joint ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='Act4'
JOINT / 9
, NAME = 'Act4'
, I = 29
, J = 22
, Revolute
 
 
!======================================== Motion ========================================
!
MOTION / 17
, NAME = 'Act4.RMotion'
, JOINT = 9
, ROTATION 
, DISPLACEMENT 
, FUNCTION = sin(PI*time*2)*0.2\
 
 
!======================================== Coupler ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='Coupler1'
COUPLER/1
, NAME = 'Coupler1'
, JOINTS = 6, 4
, TYPE = R : R
, SCALES = 32., -60.


!======================================== Coupler ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='Coupler2'
COUPLER/2
, NAME = 'Coupler2'
, JOINTS = 7, 2
, TYPE = R : R
, SCALES = 360., -54.


!======================================== Coupler ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='Coupler3'
COUPLER/3
, NAME = 'Coupler3'
, JOINTS = 8, 3
, TYPE = R : R
, SCALES = 360., -108.


!======================================== Coupler ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='Coupler4'
COUPLER/4
, NAME = 'Coupler4'
, JOINTS = 9, 5
, TYPE = R : R
, SCALES = 360., -108.


!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='q1_motion'
EXPRESSION / 1
, NAME = 'q1_motion'
, FUNCTION = sin(PI*time*2)*3\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='q2_motion'
EXPRESSION / 2
, NAME = 'q2_motion'
, FUNCTION = sin(PI*time*2)*0.2\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='q3_motion'
EXPRESSION / 3
, NAME = 'q3_motion'
, FUNCTION = sin(PI*time*2)*0.2\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='q4_motion'
EXPRESSION / 4
, NAME = 'q4_motion'
, FUNCTION = sin(PI*time*2)*0.2\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='body4_sep_x'
EXPRESSION / 5
, NAME = 'body4_sep_x'
, FUNCTION = dx(49,48,48)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='body4_sep_y'
EXPRESSION / 6
, NAME = 'body4_sep_y'
, FUNCTION = dy(49,48,48)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='body4_sep_z'
EXPRESSION / 7
, NAME = 'body4_sep_z'
, FUNCTION = dz(49,48,48)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='body4_Ce_psi'
EXPRESSION / 8
, NAME = 'body4_Ce_psi'
, FUNCTION = psi(49,48)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='body4_Ce_theta'
EXPRESSION / 9
, NAME = 'body4_Ce_theta'
, FUNCTION = theta(49,48)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='body4_Ce_phi'
EXPRESSION / 10
, NAME = 'body4_Ce_phi'
, FUNCTION = phi(49,48)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='q1_rev'
EXPRESSION / 11
, NAME = 'q1_rev'
, FUNCTION = az(8,16)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='q2_rev'
EXPRESSION / 12
, NAME = 'q2_rev'
, FUNCTION = az(37,9)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='q3_rev'
EXPRESSION / 13
, NAME = 'q3_rev'
, FUNCTION = az(42,38)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='q4_rev'
EXPRESSION / 14
, NAME = 'q4_rev'
, FUNCTION = az(48,43)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='q1_act'
EXPRESSION / 15
, NAME = 'q1_act'
, FUNCTION = az(5,23)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='q2_act'
EXPRESSION / 16
, NAME = 'q2_act'
, FUNCTION = az(34,24)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='q3_act'
EXPRESSION / 17
, NAME = 'q3_act'
, FUNCTION = az(31,25)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='q4_act'
EXPRESSION / 18
, NAME = 'q4_act'
, FUNCTION = az(28,26)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='body1_sijp_x'
EXPRESSION / 19
, NAME = 'body1_sijp_x'
, FUNCTION = dx(16,15,15)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='body1_sijp_y'
EXPRESSION / 20
, NAME = 'body1_sijp_y'
, FUNCTION = dy(16,15,15)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='body1_sijp_z'
EXPRESSION / 21
, NAME = 'body1_sijp_z'
, FUNCTION = dz(16,15,15)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='body1_Cij_psi'
EXPRESSION / 22
, NAME = 'body1_Cij_psi'
, FUNCTION = psi(16,15)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='body1_Cij_theta'
EXPRESSION / 23
, NAME = 'body1_Cij_theta'
, FUNCTION = theta(16,15)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='body1_Cij_phi'
EXPRESSION / 24
, NAME = 'body1_Cij_phi'
, FUNCTION = phi(16,15)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='body1_ri_x'
EXPRESSION / 25
, NAME = 'body1_ri_x'
, FUNCTION = dx(8,15,15)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='body1_ri_y'
EXPRESSION / 26
, NAME = 'body1_ri_y'
, FUNCTION = dy(8,15,15)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='body1_ri_z'
EXPRESSION / 27
, NAME = 'body1_ri_z'
, FUNCTION = dz(8,15,15)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='body1_roll'
EXPRESSION / 28
, NAME = 'body1_roll'
, FUNCTION = roll(8,15)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='body1_pitch'
EXPRESSION / 29
, NAME = 'body1_pitch'
, FUNCTION = pitch(8,15)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='body1_yaw'
EXPRESSION / 30
, NAME = 'body1_yaw'
, FUNCTION = yaw(8,15)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='body1_rhoip_x'
EXPRESSION / 31
, NAME = 'body1_rhoip_x'
, FUNCTION = dx(7,8,8)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='body1_rhoip_y'
EXPRESSION / 32
, NAME = 'body1_rhoip_y'
, FUNCTION = dy(7,8,8)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='body1_rhoip_z'
EXPRESSION / 33
, NAME = 'body1_rhoip_z'
, FUNCTION = dz(7,8,8)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='body1_Cii_psi'
EXPRESSION / 34
, NAME = 'body1_Cii_psi'
, FUNCTION = psi(7,8)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='body1_Cii_theta'
EXPRESSION / 35
, NAME = 'body1_Cii_theta'
, FUNCTION = theta(7,8)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='body1_Cii_phi'
EXPRESSION / 36
, NAME = 'body1_Cii_phi'
, FUNCTION = phi(7,8)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='body2_sijp_x'
EXPRESSION / 37
, NAME = 'body2_sijp_x'
, FUNCTION = dx(9,8,8)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='body2_sijp_y'
EXPRESSION / 38
, NAME = 'body2_sijp_y'
, FUNCTION = dy(9,8,8)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='body2_sijp_z'
EXPRESSION / 39
, NAME = 'body2_sijp_z'
, FUNCTION = dz(9,8,8)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='body2_Cij_psi'
EXPRESSION / 40
, NAME = 'body2_Cij_psi'
, FUNCTION = psi(9,8)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='body2_Cij_theta'
EXPRESSION / 41
, NAME = 'body2_Cij_theta'
, FUNCTION = theta(9,8)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='body2_Cij_phi'
EXPRESSION / 42
, NAME = 'body2_Cij_phi'
, FUNCTION = phi(9,8)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='body2_ri_x'
EXPRESSION / 43
, NAME = 'body2_ri_x'
, FUNCTION = dx(37,15,15)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='body2_ri_y'
EXPRESSION / 44
, NAME = 'body2_ri_y'
, FUNCTION = dy(37,15,15)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='body2_ri_z'
EXPRESSION / 45
, NAME = 'body2_ri_z'
, FUNCTION = dz(37,15,15)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='body2_roll'
EXPRESSION / 46
, NAME = 'body2_roll'
, FUNCTION = roll(37,15)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='body2_pitch'
EXPRESSION / 47
, NAME = 'body2_pitch'
, FUNCTION = pitch(37,15)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='body2_yaw'
EXPRESSION / 48
, NAME = 'body2_yaw'
, FUNCTION = yaw(37,15)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='body2_rhoip_x'
EXPRESSION / 49
, NAME = 'body2_rhoip_x'
, FUNCTION = dx(36,37,37)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='body2_rhoip_y'
EXPRESSION / 50
, NAME = 'body2_rhoip_y'
, FUNCTION = dy(36,37,37)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='body2_rhoip_z'
EXPRESSION / 51
, NAME = 'body2_rhoip_z'
, FUNCTION = dz(36,37,37)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='body2_Cii_psi'
EXPRESSION / 52
, NAME = 'body2_Cii_psi'
, FUNCTION = psi(36,37)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='body2_Cii_theta'
EXPRESSION / 53
, NAME = 'body2_Cii_theta'
, FUNCTION = theta(36,37)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='body2_Cii_phi'
EXPRESSION / 54
, NAME = 'body2_Cii_phi'
, FUNCTION = phi(36,37)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='body3_sijp_x'
EXPRESSION / 55
, NAME = 'body3_sijp_x'
, FUNCTION = dx(38,37,37)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='body3_sijp_y'
EXPRESSION / 56
, NAME = 'body3_sijp_y'
, FUNCTION = dy(38,37,37)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='body3_sijp_z'
EXPRESSION / 57
, NAME = 'body3_sijp_z'
, FUNCTION = dz(38,37,37)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='body3_Cij_psi'
EXPRESSION / 58
, NAME = 'body3_Cij_psi'
, FUNCTION = psi(38,37)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='body3_Cij_theta'
EXPRESSION / 59
, NAME = 'body3_Cij_theta'
, FUNCTION = theta(38,37)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='body3_Cij_phi'
EXPRESSION / 60
, NAME = 'body3_Cij_phi'
, FUNCTION = phi(38,37)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='body3_ri_x'
EXPRESSION / 61
, NAME = 'body3_ri_x'
, FUNCTION = dx(42,15,15)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='body3_ri_y'
EXPRESSION / 62
, NAME = 'body3_ri_y'
, FUNCTION = dy(42,15,15)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='body3_ri_z'
EXPRESSION / 63
, NAME = 'body3_ri_z'
, FUNCTION = dz(42,15,15)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='body3_roll'
EXPRESSION / 64
, NAME = 'body3_roll'
, FUNCTION = roll(42,15)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='body3_pitch'
EXPRESSION / 65
, NAME = 'body3_pitch'
, FUNCTION = pitch(42,15)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='body3_yaw'
EXPRESSION / 66
, NAME = 'body3_yaw'
, FUNCTION = yaw(42,15)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='body3_rhoip_x'
EXPRESSION / 67
, NAME = 'body3_rhoip_x'
, FUNCTION = dx(41,42,42)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='body3_rhoip_y'
EXPRESSION / 68
, NAME = 'body3_rhoip_y'
, FUNCTION = dy(41,42,42)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='body3_rhoip_z'
EXPRESSION / 69
, NAME = 'body3_rhoip_z'
, FUNCTION = dz(41,42,42)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='body3_Cii_psi'
EXPRESSION / 70
, NAME = 'body3_Cii_psi'
, FUNCTION = psi(41,42)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='body3_Cii_theta'
EXPRESSION / 71
, NAME = 'body3_Cii_theta'
, FUNCTION = theta(41,42)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='body3_Cii_phi'
EXPRESSION / 72
, NAME = 'body3_Cii_phi'
, FUNCTION = phi(41,42)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='body4_sijp_x'
EXPRESSION / 73
, NAME = 'body4_sijp_x'
, FUNCTION = dx(43,42,42)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='body4_sijp_y'
EXPRESSION / 74
, NAME = 'body4_sijp_y'
, FUNCTION = dy(43,42,42)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='body4_sijp_z'
EXPRESSION / 75
, NAME = 'body4_sijp_z'
, FUNCTION = dz(43,42,42)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='body4_Cij_psi'
EXPRESSION / 76
, NAME = 'body4_Cij_psi'
, FUNCTION = psi(43,42)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='body4_Cij_theta'
EXPRESSION / 77
, NAME = 'body4_Cij_theta'
, FUNCTION = theta(43,42)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='body4_Cij_phi'
EXPRESSION / 78
, NAME = 'body4_Cij_phi'
, FUNCTION = phi(43,42)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='body4_ri_x'
EXPRESSION / 79
, NAME = 'body4_ri_x'
, FUNCTION = dx(48,15,15)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='body4_ri_y'
EXPRESSION / 80
, NAME = 'body4_ri_y'
, FUNCTION = dy(48,15,15)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='body4_ri_z'
EXPRESSION / 81
, NAME = 'body4_ri_z'
, FUNCTION = dz(48,15,15)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='body4_roll'
EXPRESSION / 82
, NAME = 'body4_roll'
, FUNCTION = roll(48,15)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='body4_pitch'
EXPRESSION / 83
, NAME = 'body4_pitch'
, FUNCTION = pitch(48,15)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='body4_yaw'
EXPRESSION / 84
, NAME = 'body4_yaw'
, FUNCTION = yaw(48,15)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='body4_rhoip_x'
EXPRESSION / 85
, NAME = 'body4_rhoip_x'
, FUNCTION = dx(47,48,48)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='body4_rhoip_y'
EXPRESSION / 86
, NAME = 'body4_rhoip_y'
, FUNCTION = dy(47,48,48)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='body4_rhoip_z'
EXPRESSION / 87
, NAME = 'body4_rhoip_z'
, FUNCTION = dz(47,48,48)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='body4_Cii_psi'
EXPRESSION / 88
, NAME = 'body4_Cii_psi'
, FUNCTION = psi(47,48)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='body4_Cii_theta'
EXPRESSION / 89
, NAME = 'body4_Cii_theta'
, FUNCTION = theta(47,48)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='body4_Cii_phi'
EXPRESSION / 90
, NAME = 'body4_Cii_phi'
, FUNCTION = phi(47,48)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='end_rx'
EXPRESSION / 91
, NAME = 'end_rx'
, FUNCTION = dx(49,15,15)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='end_ry'
EXPRESSION / 92
, NAME = 'end_ry'
, FUNCTION = dy(49,15,15)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='end_rz'
EXPRESSION / 93
, NAME = 'end_rz'
, FUNCTION = dz(49,15,15)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='end_roll'
EXPRESSION / 94
, NAME = 'end_roll'
, FUNCTION = roll(49,15)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='end_pitch'
EXPRESSION / 95
, NAME = 'end_pitch'
, FUNCTION = pitch(49,15)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='end_yaw'
EXPRESSION / 96
, NAME = 'end_yaw'
, FUNCTION = yaw(49,15)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='end_drx'
EXPRESSION / 97
, NAME = 'end_drx'
, FUNCTION = vx(49,15,15,15)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='end_dry'
EXPRESSION / 98
, NAME = 'end_dry'
, FUNCTION = vy(49,15,15,15)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='end_drz'
EXPRESSION / 99
, NAME = 'end_drz'
, FUNCTION = vz(49,15,15,15)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='end_wx'
EXPRESSION / 100
, NAME = 'end_wx'
, FUNCTION = wx(49,15,15)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='end_wy'
EXPRESSION / 101
, NAME = 'end_wy'
, FUNCTION = wy(49,15,15)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='end_wz'
EXPRESSION / 102
, NAME = 'end_wz'
, FUNCTION = wz(49,15,15)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='end_accx'
EXPRESSION / 103
, NAME = 'end_accx'
, FUNCTION = accx(49,15,15,15)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='end_accy'
EXPRESSION / 104
, NAME = 'end_accy'
, FUNCTION = accy(49,15,15,15)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='end_accz'
EXPRESSION / 105
, NAME = 'end_accz'
, FUNCTION = accz(49,15,15,15)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!==================================== Expression Request ====================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='ExRq_q_act'
REQUEST / 1
, NAME = 'ExRq_q_act'
, F2 = az(5,23)\
, F2NAME = '(q1_act)'
, F3 = az(34,24)\
, F3NAME = '(q2_act)'
, F4 = az(31,25)\
, F4NAME = '(q3_act)'
, F6 = az(28,26)\
, F6NAME = '(q4_act)'
, F7 = 0.0\
, F7NAME = ''
, F8 = 0.0\
, F8NAME = ''


!==================================== Expression Request ====================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='ExRq_q_rev'
REQUEST / 2
, NAME = 'ExRq_q_rev'
, F2 = az(8,16)\
, F2NAME = '(q1_rev)'
, F3 = az(37,9)\
, F3NAME = '(q2_rev)'
, F4 = az(42,38)\
, F4NAME = '(q3_rev)'
, F6 = az(48,43)\
, F6NAME = '(q4_rev)'
, F7 = 0.0\
, F7NAME = ''
, F8 = 0.0\
, F8NAME = ''


!==================================== Expression Request ====================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='ExRq_end'
REQUEST / 3
, NAME = 'ExRq_end'
, F2 = dx(49,15,15)\
, F2NAME = '(end_rx)'
, F3 = dy(49,15,15)\
, F3NAME = '(end_ry)'
, F4 = dz(49,15,15)\
, F4NAME = '(end_rz)'
, F6 = roll(49,15)\
, F6NAME = '(end_roll)'
, F7 = pitch(49,15)\
, F7NAME = '(end_pitch)'
, F8 = yaw(49,15)\
, F8NAME = '(end_yaw)'


!==================================== Expression Request ====================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='ExRq_end_v'
REQUEST / 4
, NAME = 'ExRq_end_v'
, F2 = vx(49,15,15,15)\
, F2NAME = '(end_drx)'
, F3 = vy(49,15,15,15)\
, F3NAME = '(end_dry)'
, F4 = vz(49,15,15,15)\
, F4NAME = '(end_drz)'
, F6 = wx(49,15,15)\
, F6NAME = '(end_wx)'
, F7 = wy(49,15,15)\
, F7NAME = '(end_wy)'
, F8 = wz(49,15,15)\
, F8NAME = '(end_wz)'


!==================================== Expression Request ====================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='ExRq_end_a'
REQUEST / 5
, NAME = 'ExRq_end_a'
, F2 = accx(49,15,15,15)\
, F2NAME = '(end_accx)'
, F3 = accy(49,15,15,15)\
, F3NAME = '(end_accy)'
, F4 = accz(49,15,15,15)\
, F4NAME = '(end_accz)'
, F6 = wx(49,15,15)\
, F6NAME = '(end_wx)'
, F7 = wy(49,15,15)\
, F7NAME = '(end_wy)'
, F8 = wz(49,15,15)\
, F8NAME = '(end_wz)'


!======================================== UNIT ========================================
!
UNITS / 
, FORCE = Newton
, FORCE_SYMBOL = 'N'
, MASS = Kilogram
, MASS_SYMBOL = 'kg'
, LENGTH = Meter
, LENGTH_SYMBOL = 'm'
, TIME = Second
, TIME_SYMBOL = 's'


!======================================== GRAVITY ========================================
!
accgrav /  IGRAV = 0
, JGRAV = -9.80665
, KGRAV = 0


!======================================== OUTPUT ========================================
!
OUTPUT/GRSAVE
, RPLTSAVE = TRUE
, RADSAVE = TRUE
, REQSAVE = TRUE
, OUTSAVE = TRUE
, MSGSAVE = TRUE
, RANSAVE = TRUE
, RPMXSAVE = TRUE
, MCKSAVE = TRUE
, MODELVERIFICATIONMSG = FALSE
, JOINTINFORMATIONMSG = FALSE
, CONSTRAINTINFORMATIONMSG = FALSE
, REDUNDANTCONSTRAINTMSG = TRUE
, INDEPENDENTCOORDINATEMSG = FALSE
, SOLVERINFORMATIONMSG = TRUE
, ANALYSISINFORMATIONMSG = TRUE
, INTEGRATORINFORMATIONMSG = TRUE
, CONSTRAINTVIOLATIONMSG = FALSE
, ANALYSISPROCESSMSG = TRUE
, STPMSG = TRUE
, STEP_PLOT_FACTOR = 1
, MATCH_ENDTIME = TRUE
, SETTIMEOFFSETTOICFTIME
, KEEPICFPLOTSTEP = RECENT


!======================================= INTPAR =======================================
!
INTPAR / ADVHYBRID
, KMAX = 2
, HMAX = 0.01
, INITIAL_H = 1e-06
, ERROR = 0.005
, SPARSE = FALSE
, NDAMPING = 1
, TRKJACFACTOR = 100
, INTERPOLATE_H


!===================================== EQUILIBRIUM =====================================
!
EQUILIBRIUM /
, ERROR = 0.001
, MAXIT = 100
, INITIALSTEPSIZE = 1e-05
, HMAX = 1
, STEPSIZEFACTOR = 2
, ANIMATIONFLAG = 0
, TYPE = 2


!===================================== SOLVEROPTION ======================================
!
SOLVEROPTION /
, SIMULATIONSTATUS
, TIMEOFFSET = 0.000000
, TOLERANCEIF = 1e-08
, CHECKREDUNDANT = EVERYSTEP
, INITIALVELOCITY = RELATIVE
, STOPBYREDUNDANT = FALSE
, MODIFIED_INTEGRATOR_FAILURE = TRUE
, GR_LIMIT_ANGLE_DEGREE = 30
, BUSHINGROTATION = QUATERNION
, MAXIMUMCONVERGENCECOUNT = 10
, RFLEXMASSINV = FULL
, RFLEXEVJ_CHECKREDUN = ONCE
, MSGOUTFACTOR = 100
, IMPROVEMENTPREANALYSISACCURACY = TRUE
, FILLZEROFORBLANKINCONFILE  = 0
, NUM_THREAD = Auto
, SOLVERTYPENFLEX = DMFS
, SETLINEARSOLVERFORMBD = AUTO
, PLOT_GLOBAL_FLAG_CONGEOPRI = FALSE
, ADVANCED_MSSF = TRUE


!==================================== Stop by Condition ====================================
!
STOPBYCONDITION /
, E1 = 0.0\
, ACTIVEFLAG = FALSE


!===================================== INFO ======================================
!
INFO /
, MODEL_NAME = 'WOR'
, CURRENT_SYSTEM_NAME = 'WOR'


END
END
